source_name: EDHREC average + EDHREC live + cEDH DDB/Moxfield refs
deck_name: EDHREC Average Default — Boros Combat Trigger Humans
notes: EDHREC live: 12840 decks, rank 149, type counts {'creature': 46, 'instant': 8, 'sorcery': 3, 'artifact': 6, 'enchantment': 4, 'planeswalker': 0, 'battle': 0, 'land': 32}; profile source_count=3.

cards.name: Winota, Joiner of Forces
cards.oracle_text: Whenever a non-Human creature you control attacks, look at the top six cards of your library. You may put a Human creature card from among them onto the battlefield tapped and attacking. It gains indestructible until end of turn. Put the rest of the cards on the bottom of your library in a random order.

analysis.psychology_fear: Perder a janela de ataque/triggers de Winota ou nao ter pressao suficiente.
analysis.psychology_opportunity: Converter combate em vantagem assimetrica antes que oponentes estabilizem.
analysis.psychology_tradeoff: Menos slots de draw/control generico; mais slots lineares de enabler/hit.
analysis.alternatives: Nao ha substituto funcional no command zone; o plano depende do texto de Winota.

insights.text: Winota exige separar enablers nao-Humanos de hits Humanos; creature_count total sozinho e enganoso.
Aggro-stax pode ter draw baixo porque a vantagem vem de mana cheat/triggers, nao de comprar cartas.
O single-tag ManaLoom classifica muitos hits Humanos como creature, perdendo papel contextual de payoff/stax.
Profile Winota pede lands 31-35; o deck EDHREC default tem 34 lands e fica dentro do range real.

discrepancies.description: Single-tag ve criatura/draw-like conforme oracle; contexto real e engine de mana cheat e card selection por ataques nao-Humanos.
ManaLoom real cai em creature, mas no deck e hit Human/stax central; EDHREC Game Changers lista 6406/12840.
Single-tag creature nao captura que e payoff de dano/clock; EDHREC high synergy 11191/12840.
